payload.description:
**As a** report service, **I want** `generate()` to return the expected `Tuple[Optional[Dict], Optional[str]]`, **so that** the block can participate in report generation without error.

In this shell story, `generate()` returns a well-formed output dictionary with status information and an empty topics list, plus a log string. This proves the block can participate in the report generation lifecycle before any real dependencies (OpenSearch, embeddings, clustering) are wired up.

## Key Files

- Modify: `plexus/reports/blocks/vector_topic_memory.py`
- Modify: `plexus/reports/blocks/vector_topic_memory_test.py`

## Dependencies

Story plx-be9cda (Block registration and instantiation)
payload.title: Generate returns structured output envelope
